newProject.title: Create a new project
newProject.subtitle: MarketPilot will research your brand and generate a full marketing intelligence brief.
newProject.websiteUrlHint: Used to research your brand, competitors, and market positioning automatically.
newProject.socialProfilesHint: Add your social media pages to enrich the brand analysis. Great if you don't have a website yet.
newProject.targetMarketHint: Focuses research on your target market — competitors, audience, and content strategies.
newProject.descriptionPlaceholder: What does your product do? Who is it for?
newProject.setupTime: Takes about 2 minutes to set up

login.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your MarketPilot account
login.testimonial: MarketPilot cut our content production time by 80%. The AI actually understands our brand.
login.testimonialAuthor: — Sarah Chen, Head of Marketing at Nexus Labs

signup.subtitle: Start your free 14-day trial. No credit card required.

signup.confirmationSent: We sent a confirmation link to
signup.perk3: Publish to all platforms at once
signup.leftPanelTitle: Your AI marketing team, ready on day one.
signup.leftPanelSubtitle: No more briefing agencies. No more blank page moments. MarketPilot thinks in your brand's voice and publishes while you sleep.

hero.subtitle: MarketPilot uses AI to generate on-brand content, automate scheduling, and grow your social presence — across every platform, all at once.

features.title: Everything you need to dominate social
features.subtitle: From brand intelligence to auto-replies, MarketPilot handles the full lifecycle of social media marketing.
features.feat1Desc: Upload brand assets, tone guides, and competitor intel. MarketPilot learns your brand DNA and keeps every post on-message.
features.feat2Desc: Specialized AI agents for copywriting, image generation, and campaign strategy. Each skill trained on marketing best practices.
features.feat3Desc: Plan, schedule, and publish across every platform from a single drag-and-drop calendar. Never miss a posting window.
features.feat4Desc: Connect Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Instagram, and more. Publish simultaneously with platform-optimized formatting.
features.feat5Desc: Intelligent comment and DM responses that match your brand voice. Engage your audience 24/7 without lifting a finger.
features.feat6Desc: Track reach, engagement, and conversions per campaign. AI-driven insights surface what’s working and why.

steps.title: Up and running in minutes
steps.subtitle: Three steps from zero to a fully automated marketing engine.
steps.step1Desc: Set up a workspace for your brand. Connect social accounts and upload brand guidelines in minutes.
steps.step2Title: Train the AI on your brand
steps.step2Desc: Feed MarketPilot your tone of voice, visual identity, and target audience. The AI learns what makes your brand unique.
steps.step3Desc: Create campaigns with a single prompt. Review, refine, and schedule posts across all platforms at once.

cta.title: Ready to pilot your growth?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of marketers who use MarketPilot to save time and drive results.
